name: Base game — default bet, single spin
description: Spin once at the default bet; verify balance arithmetic and a valid bet.
setup_instructions: Ensure the ante bet / bet+ toggle is OFF if the game has one. Leave the bet at its default value. Then spin once.

custom_assertions.description: betAmount is positive
winAmount finite and non-negative
endingBalance reflects bet/win arithmetic

name: Bet boundary — minimum bet
description: Set bet to the minimum and spin once; verify the bet clamps at the floor.
setup_instructions: Set the bet to the MINIMUM using the bet-minus control (click it until it stops decreasing). Then spin once.

custom_assertions.description: betAmount is positive at the floor
balance arithmetic holds

name: Bet boundary — maximum bet
description: Set bet to the maximum and spin once; verify the bet clamps at the ceiling.
setup_instructions: Set the bet to the MAXIMUM using the bet-plus control (click it until it stops increasing). Then spin once.

custom_assertions.description: betAmount is positive at the ceiling
balance arithmetic holds

name: Game launching — mid-spin disconnect recovery
description: Start a spin, force a reload while the round is still resolving, and verify the recovered session honors the round without duplicate debit or lost win.
setup_instructions: Set the bet to the minimum. Start a spin, then force a page reload mid-animation as soon as the reels begin moving. Wait for the game to return to the main screen and settle.

custom_assertions.description: at least one round result was captured around the reload
recovered balance never goes negative
reload did not duplicate a settled round id

name: Bet settings — minimum bet matches rule
description: Click bet-minus to the floor and verify the on-screen BET equals the configured minimum bet.
setup_instructions: Click the bet-minus control until the bet reaches the floor. Do not spin; read the BET / Total Bet display.

custom_assertions.description: BET display equals {{betMin}} when configured
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const expected = {{betMin}}; return expected == null || screen.bet == null || Math.abs(screen.bet - expected) <= 0.01; })()

name: Bet settings — maximum bet matches rule
description: Click bet-plus to the ceiling and verify the on-screen BET equals the configured maximum bet.
setup_instructions: Click the bet-plus control until the bet reaches the ceiling. Do not spin; read the BET / Total Bet display.

custom_assertions.description: BET display equals {{betMax}} when configured
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const expected = {{betMax}}; return expected == null || screen.bet == null || Math.abs(screen.bet - expected) <= 0.01; })()

name: Bet settings — bet persists after spin
description: Set a non-default bet, spin once, and verify the game keeps the same bet after the round settles.
setup_instructions: Set a non-default bet: use a mid-range bet if available, otherwise set the bet to the maximum. Spin once and wait until the round fully settles.

custom_assertions.description: BET display after the spin matches the bet used by the captured round
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const last = collector.spins[collector.spins.length - 1]; return !last || screen.bet == null || typeof last.betAmount !== 'number' || Math.abs(screen.bet - last.betAmount) <= 0.01; })()

custom_assertions.description: balance arithmetic holds at the chosen bet

name: Bet settings — bet controls locked mid-spin
description: Try to change bet while a spin is resolving; verify the round is not disrupted and no extra spin is created.
setup_instructions: Set the bet to the minimum. Start a spin, then immediately try the bet-plus and bet-minus controls while the reels are still moving. Wait for the round to settle.

custom_assertions.description: mid-spin bet-control clicks did not create extra spin rounds
runner did not detect swallowed/dropped spin clicks

name: Bet settings — spin blocked if bet exceeds balance
description: When the wallet cannot afford the selected bet, spin must be blocked with no negative balance.
setup_instructions: If the test wallet can be driven below the selected bet, set the bet above the available balance and attempt to spin. Otherwise run at maximum bet and verify balances remain non-negative.

custom_assertions.description: no captured balance goes negative

name: Base game — balance never negative
description: Drive the session toward a low balance and verify spins stop or reconcile without ever going below zero.
setup_instructions: Set the bet to the maximum affordable value and spin repeatedly toward the wallet floor. Stop when the game blocks further spins or the configured spin budget is reached.

custom_assertions.description: every captured ending balance is >= 0
all captured rounds reconcile
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

name: Max win cap — cap enforced when reached
description: Run a long winning-round watch and verify any capped win obeys the game's maximum-win behavior when the cap is observable.
setup_instructions: Spin a long batch at a stable bet and watch for a max-win / capped-win condition. If the cap is reached, verify the round stops/pays according to the rules.

custom_assertions.description: all captured wins are finite and non-negative
all captured rounds reconcile while watching for cap
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

name: Base game — 10-spin balance consistency
description: Spin 10 times at default bet; verify per-round balance arithmetic on every round.
setup_instructions: Leave the bet at its default value. Then spin 10 times.

custom_assertions.description: every captured round reconciles bet/win
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: every round has a unique id

name: Autoplay — 10 spins
description: Run 10 autoplay spins; verify the batch completes and reconciles.
setup_instructions: Open the autoplay settings popup, set the number of spins to 10 (or the closest available), and start autoplay. Let all 10 spins run.

custom_assertions.description: captured at least the requested rounds
cumulative bet/win reconciles
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

name: Autoplay — 50 spins at minimum bet
description: Run native autoplay at the minimum bet and verify balance integrity across the batch.
setup_instructions: Set the bet to the minimum. Open the autoplay settings popup, select 50 spins (or the closest available preset), start autoplay, and let the batch finish.

custom_assertions.description: autoplay captured at least one settled round
cumulative bet/win reconciles
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

name: Autoplay — 50 spins at maximum bet
description: Run native autoplay at the maximum bet when funds allow and verify integrity or a clean stop when funds run out.
setup_instructions: Set the bet to the maximum. Open the autoplay settings popup, select 50 spins (or the closest available preset), start autoplay, and let it run until the batch finishes or the game stops because funds are insufficient.

custom_assertions.description: autoplay captured at least one settled round
cumulative bet/win reconciles
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

custom_assertions.description: funds exhaustion does not make balance negative

name: Autoplay — 50 spins with Turbo enabled
description: Enable Turbo spin, run autoplay, and verify accuracy is unaffected.
setup_instructions: Enable the Turbo spin option. Open the autoplay settings popup, select 50 spins (or the closest available preset), start autoplay, and let the batch finish.

custom_assertions.description: cumulative bet/win reconciles with Turbo enabled
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

name: Autoplay — 50 spins with Quick Spin enabled
description: Enable Quick Spin when available, run autoplay, and verify accuracy is unaffected.
setup_instructions: Enable the Quick Spin / Fast Spin option. Open the autoplay settings popup, select 50 spins (or the closest available preset), start autoplay, and let the batch finish.

custom_assertions.description: cumulative bet/win reconciles with Quick Spin enabled
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

name: Autoplay — manual stop works
description: Start a 50-spin autoplay batch, stop after several rounds, and verify it halts cleanly after the current round.
setup_instructions: Open the autoplay settings popup, select 50 spins (or the closest available preset), start autoplay, let about 10 rounds run, then click Stop. Wait until the current round settles.

custom_assertions.description: manual stop flow captured at least one round
captured rounds reconcile after manual stop
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

name: Turbo spin — same outcome, faster
description: Enable turbo spin and spin once; verify it still produces a valid, reconciled result.
setup_instructions: Enable the turbo / quick-spin toggle. Then spin once.

custom_assertions.description: balance arithmetic holds under turbo

name: Ante bet / Bet+ — total bet increases
description: Toggle the ante bet ON; verify total bet rises, then spin once.
setup_instructions: Turn the ante bet / bet+ / double-chance toggle ON (it usually raises the total bet, often by 25%). Then spin once.

custom_assertions.description: betAmount positive with ante on
balance arithmetic holds with ante on

name: Ante bet — toggle changes stake
description: Toggle Ante ON and verify the stake changes according to the special-bet behavior.
setup_instructions: Note the current BET / Total Bet. Toggle the Ante / Bet+ / Double Chance control ON. Spin once with Ante ON.

custom_assertions.description: Ante ON produces a valid positive stake
Ante ON stake is not below configured minimum when known
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const min = {{betMin}}; return min == null || typeof spin.betAmount !== 'number' || spin.betAmount + 0.01 >= min; })()

custom_assertions.description: balance arithmetic holds with Ante ON

name: Ante bet — OFF restores base stake
description: Turn Ante ON, then OFF, and verify the base stake is restored.
setup_instructions: Set the bet to the minimum. Toggle Ante / Bet+ ON, then toggle it OFF again. Spin once with Ante OFF.

custom_assertions.description: Ante OFF spin uses the configured base minimum bet when known
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const min = {{betMin}}; return min == null || typeof spin.betAmount !== 'number' || Math.abs(spin.betAmount - min) <= 0.01; })()

custom_assertions.description: balance arithmetic holds after Ante OFF

name: Ante bet — Buy Feature disabled when Ante ON
description: When a title disables Buy Feature under Ante ON, verify the buy control is unavailable or rejected without charge.
setup_instructions: Toggle Ante / Bet+ ON. Inspect the Buy Feature button and try to open it only if it is visibly enabled. Do not confirm any purchase.

custom_assertions.description: inspection did not trigger a buy spin
no engine errors while checking Buy under Ante ON

name: Buy feature — purchase triggers free spins
description: Buy the feature; verify a large deduction and a free-spin chain plays out.
setup_instructions: Click the buy bonus / buy feature button, then confirm the purchase in the confirmation popup. Let the free-spin chain play out fully.

custom_assertions.description: buy cost is a large multiple of base bet
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const d = detectBuyFeatureDeduction(collector.spins, 0, balanceBefore); return d != null && d.ratio >= 50; })()

custom_assertions.description: free-spin frames observed after purchase

name: Free spins — no bet deducted during free spins
description: Enter free spins and verify free-spin rounds do not debit the bet; balance only rises by wins.
setup_instructions: Trigger free spins organically or via a safe available feature path. Once free spins begin, let the entire free-spin sequence play out.

custom_assertions.description: free-spin rounds do not deduct a bet
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => s.startingBalance == null || s.endingBalance >= s.startingBalance - 0.001)

custom_assertions.description: free-spin rounds are well formed
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0 && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && s.winAmount >= 0)

name: Buy feature — bought trigger spin valid
description: Buy the feature and verify the trigger produces a valid bonus/free-spin entry.
setup_instructions: Click Buy Feature, confirm the purchase, dismiss any congratulations / press-anywhere popup, and let the triggered feature begin.

custom_assertions.description: buy trigger has a large purchase deduction
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const d = detectBuyFeatureDeduction(collector.spins, 0, balanceBefore); return d != null && d.ratio >= 20; })()

custom_assertions.description: feature/free-spin frames are observed after purchase

name: Buy feature — no bet deducted during bought feature
description: After buying a feature, verify feature/free-spin rounds do not charge an additional per-spin bet.
setup_instructions: Buy the feature, confirm the purchase, dismiss any trigger popup, and let all bought feature/free-spin rounds finish.

custom_assertions.description: free-spin/bought-feature rounds do not deduct per-spin bet
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => s.startingBalance == null || s.endingBalance >= s.startingBalance - 0.001)

name: Buy feature — confirmation dialog cancel vs confirm
description: Open the Buy Feature confirmation dialog, cancel it, and verify no charge or spin is triggered.
setup_instructions: Click Buy Feature to open the confirmation dialog. Click Cancel / Close, not Confirm. Verify the popup closes and no buy spin starts.

custom_assertions.description: canceling buy confirmation triggers no spin response
canceling buy confirmation produces no engine errors

name: Buy feature — blocked on insufficient funds
description: When the wallet cannot afford the buy price, the purchase must be rejected without deduction.
setup_instructions: If the test wallet can be driven below the Buy Feature cost, attempt to buy with insufficient funds. Otherwise open the Buy Feature dialog and cancel safely.

custom_assertions.description: insufficient-funds buy attempt does not start a feature spin
no observed balance is negative

name: Buy feature — disabled when Ante ON
description: With Ante ON, verify Buy Feature is unavailable or rejected without charge when the game rules require it.
setup_instructions: Toggle Ante / Bet+ ON. Try to open Buy Feature only if it is visibly enabled; do not confirm a purchase. Verify no spin or charge occurs.

custom_assertions.description: Buy under Ante ON inspection does not trigger a spin
Buy under Ante ON inspection produces no engine errors

name: Free spins — organic trigger watch
description: Spin many times at default bet to try to trigger free spins; if triggered, let the bonus complete and verify FS invariants.
setup_instructions: Leave the bet at its default value. Spin up to 100 times to try to trigger free spins. If free spins start, do NOT stop — let the entire bonus (including any retriggers) play out.

custom_assertions.description: free-spin rounds don't deduct bet
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => s.startingBalance == null || s.endingBalance >= s.startingBalance - 0.001)

custom_assertions.description: free-spin rounds have valid id + non-negative win
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0 && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && s.winAmount >= 0)

name: History — latest round appears
description: Spin once, then open game history; verify the latest round is reconciled against history rows.
setup_instructions: Spin once. Then open the game history / rounds panel.

custom_assertions.description: the spin reconciles

name: History — rows match the last 5 spins
description: Spin 5 times at default bet, then open game history. The engine auto-runs the history reconciler (category=history): it clicks the history trigger, follows a NEW TAB if one opens, OCRs the rows, and matches them against the captured spins.
setup_instructions: Leave the bet at its default value. Spin 5 times, letting each spin fully settle. Then open the game history / rounds panel (it may open in a separate browser tab).

custom_assertions.description: at least 5 round-end spins were captured to back-fill the history panel
all recorded spins were placed at the same configured bet
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const b = collector.spins.map(s => s.betAmount).filter(x => typeof x === 'number'); return b.length > 0 && b.every(x => Math.abs(x - b[0]) <= 0.01); })()

custom_assertions.description: every spin has a non-empty string id, all unique (history row key)
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0) && new Set(collector.spins.map(s => s.id)).size === collector.spins.length

custom_assertions.description: screen.balance OCR matches the latest spin endingBalance (within 0.01)
custom_assertions.check_code: screen.balance == null || (() => { const last = collector.spins[collector.spins.length - 1]; return last == null || typeof last.endingBalance !== 'number' || Math.abs(screen.balance - last.endingBalance) <= 0.01; })()

custom_assertions.description: no spins were debounced or lost while opening history

name: History — free-spin rows distinguishable from bet rows
description: Autoplay enough rounds to organically trigger free spins, then the engine auto-opens game history (category=history) and matches rows to captured spins. Verifies the recorded rounds the history panel shows are FUNCTIONALLY distinct: free-spin rounds carry ZERO stake (and can still win), normal rounds carry a positive stake — that zero-vs-staked contrast is exactly what makes a free-spin row tell-apart-able from a bet row. INCONCLUSIVE (assertions vacuous-pass) on a run where free spins never trigger; autoplay at the highest tile maximises the chance.
setup_instructions: Leave the bet at its default value. Spin a large batch via autoplay (the engine converts this to the game's native autoplay at its highest preset) to try to trigger free spins; if they start, let the whole bonus play out. The engine then auto-opens the game history / rounds panel and reconciles the rows against the captured spins.

custom_assertions.description: free-spin rounds carry ZERO stake while normal rounds carry a positive stake (the contrast that makes FS rows distinguishable in history); vacuous-pass when no free spins triggered this run
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const fs = collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true); if (fs.length === 0) return true; const normal = collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin !== true); return fs.every(s => (s.betAmount ?? 0) === 0) && normal.length > 0 && normal.every(s => (s.betAmount ?? 0) > 0); })()

custom_assertions.description: every free-spin round is a well-formed history row: non-empty id, non-negative win, zero stake; vacuous-pass when no free spins triggered
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0 && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && s.winAmount >= 0 && (s.betAmount ?? 0) === 0)

name: Paytable — opens and shows payouts
description: Open the paytable / info screen; verify it displays.
setup_instructions: Open the paytable / info screen. Do not spin.

custom_assertions.description: no engine errors while opening paytable

name: Options — sound toggle
description: Open the menu/options and toggle sound; verify no errors.
setup_instructions: Open the menu / settings, then toggle the sound on/off. Do not spin.

custom_assertions.description: no engine errors during options interaction

name: Performance — spin response time
description: Spin once at default bet; verify it returns a result (latency tracked in evidence).
setup_instructions: Leave the bet at its default value. Then spin once.

custom_assertions.description: a spin response was captured

name: Bet variation — mid-range bet
description: Raise the bet a few steps above the minimum and spin once; verify the chosen bet is above the floor and reconciles.
setup_instructions: Set the bet to the MINIMUM, then click the bet-plus control 2–3 times to land on a mid-range bet (above the floor, below the ceiling). Then spin once.

custom_assertions.description: betAmount is a positive number
balance arithmetic holds at the mid bet

name: Bet boundary — above-max click rejected
description: At the maximum bet, an extra bet-plus click must NOT push the bet past the ceiling.
setup_instructions: Set the bet to the MAXIMUM (click bet-plus until it stops increasing), then click bet-plus ONE more time. Then spin once. The bet must stay at the maximum.

custom_assertions.description: betAmount is a positive number
balance arithmetic holds at the ceiling

name: Bet boundary — below-min click rejected
description: At the minimum bet, an extra bet-minus click must NOT push the bet below the floor.
setup_instructions: Set the bet to the MINIMUM (click bet-minus until it stops decreasing), then click bet-minus ONE more time. Then spin once. The bet must stay at the minimum (still positive).

custom_assertions.description: betAmount stays positive at the floor
balance arithmetic holds at the floor

name: UI consistency — balance display after spin
description: Spin once and verify the on-screen balance/bet widgets match the server-settled values (OCR cross-check).
setup_instructions: Leave the bet at its default value. Then spin once.

custom_assertions.description: the spin reconciles (bet/win/balance)
no engine errors during the spin

name: Tumble / cascade — frame dedup integrity
description: Spin several times on a tumble/cascade game; verify cascade frames collapse into one logical round each (no inflated spin count) and balance reconciles.
setup_instructions: Leave the bet at its default value. Then spin 5 times, allowing each tumble/cascade animation to finish before the next spin.

custom_assertions.description: deduped round-end count does not exceed spins requested
every captured round reconciles bet/win
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

name: Payout correctness — a winning round reconciles
description: Spin until a win lands; verify that winning round's balance reconciles (the engine also cross-checks the on-screen winning symbols against the paytable when available).
setup_instructions: Leave the bet at its default value. Spin up to 30 times; stop once at least one winning round (win > 0) has been captured.

custom_assertions.description: at least one winning round was captured
every winning round reconciles bet/win/balance
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => (s.winAmount ?? 0) > 0).every(s => s.startingBalance == null || Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + s.winAmount)) <= 0.01)

name: Free spins — trigger via long autoplay
description: Use the game's native autoplay at its HIGHEST count to try to trigger free spins, then let the whole bonus play out. More reliable than manual single spins for organic FS.
setup_instructions: Open the autoplay settings popup and select the HIGHEST available spin count (e.g. 500 or 1000). Start autoplay and let it run. If free spins trigger, do NOT stop — let the entire bonus (including any retriggers) finish before ending. Autoplay usually stops on its own when the feature triggers.

custom_assertions.description: free-spin rounds don't deduct bet
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => s.startingBalance == null || s.endingBalance >= s.startingBalance - 0.001)

custom_assertions.description: free-spin rounds have valid id + non-negative win
custom_assertions.check_code: collector.spins.filter(s => s.isFreeSpin === true).every(s => typeof s.id === 'string' && s.id.length > 0 && typeof s.winAmount === 'number' && s.winAmount >= 0)

custom_assertions.description: ≥3 of a scatter-like symbol coincides with EVERY FS trigger and never appears on a non-triggering spin (self-derived, numeric)
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const spins = collector.spins; const tIdx = new Set(); for (let i = 1; i < spins.length; i++) { const p = spins[i-1], c = spins[i]; if (p && c && p.isFreeSpin !== true && c.isFreeSpin === true) tIdx.add(i-1); } if (tIdx.size === 0) return true; const cnt = (s) => { const m = {}; if (Array.isArray(s.matrix)) s.matrix.forEach(r => Array.isArray(r) && r.forEach(cell => { const k = String(cell && (cell.symbol != null ? cell.symbol : cell.code != null ? cell.code : cell.id != null ? cell.id : cell)); m[k] = (m[k] || 0) + 1; })); return m; }; const trig = [...tIdx].map(i => cnt(spins[i])); const base = spins.filter((s, i) => s.isFreeSpin !== true && !tIdx.has(i) && Array.isArray(s.matrix)).map(cnt); const syms = new Set(); trig.forEach(m => Object.keys(m).forEach(k => syms.add(k))); for (const sym of syms) { if (trig.every(m => (m[sym] || 0) >= 3) && !base.some(m => (m[sym] || 0) >= 3)) return true; } return false; })()

name: Bet Max +1 Clamped, Spin Reconciles
description: Verifies that pressing bet-plus at the maximum bet does not exceed the max, then a single spin at max bet reconciles balance arithmetic without engine warnings or negative balance.
setup_instructions: 1) Wait for the game to be idle at the base screen. 2) Repeatedly press the bet-plus (increase stake) control until the bet reaches the maximum value ({{betMax}}); stop when further presses no longer change the displayed bet. 3) Press bet-plus one additional time to attempt to exceed the max. 4) Confirm the bet display still equals {{betMax}}. 5) Perform exactly one spin and wait for the round to fully settle.

custom_assertions.description: Captured spin bet equals the configured maximum bet and does not exceed it.
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const s = spin; if (!s || typeof s.betAmount !== 'number') return false; return expected_bet == null ? s.betAmount > 0 : s.betAmount === expected_bet; })()

custom_assertions.description: Captured bet is strictly positive.
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const s = spin; return !!s && typeof s.betAmount === 'number' && s.betAmount > 0; })()

custom_assertions.description: Ending balance equals starting balance minus bet plus win (with small float tolerance).
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const s = spin; if (!s) return false; if (typeof s.startingBalance !== 'number' || typeof s.endingBalance !== 'number' || typeof s.betAmount !== 'number') return false; const win = typeof s.winAmount === 'number' ? s.winAmount : 0; return Math.abs(s.endingBalance - (s.startingBalance - s.betAmount + win)) < 0.01; })()

custom_assertions.description: Ending balance is never negative and screen balance (if present) is non-negative.
custom_assertions.check_code: (() => { const s = spin; const endOk = !s || typeof s.endingBalance !== 'number' || s.endingBalance >= 0; const screenOk = !screen || screen.balance == null || screen.balance >= 0; return endOk && screenOk; })()

custom_assertions.description: No engine warnings or errors were captured during the boundary attempt and spin.
